name: Tyler Foote
subject: You will be a leader in 2017
body:
Peter - I hope you have had a wonderful holiday and great start to the new year.
---
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | Peter,
| | I hope you had a relaxing holiday and great start to the new year. I'm looking ahead towards a big year for advancing freedom, and I'm looking for a few more good leaders.

On Monday, January 16th, 250 citizen leaders will show up at the state capitol for our 2017 Lobby Day. Will you [join](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=a4ef9b95971ab89d0335f8c3f9dd23d63cde0151bb3732ca8fe6a2b34a20d8ea343f27492b0abc53 "join") them?
---

Americans for Prosperity is providing free bus transportation, training, and great invited speakers like Ed Gillespie, Supervisor Corey Stewart, and Senator Frank Wagner. The 2017 Lobby Day is your opportunity to show lawmakers that we expect spending cuts, lower taxes, regulatory reform, and school choice.

[**2017 AFP Lobby Day**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=a4ef9b95971ab89d255adc24de2baa29f9ea0f60e21336e9cfd65157180e3dd9cf2ec705c3f85ca6 "2017 AFP Lobby Day")
Building the Path to Prosperity in Virginia

**Monday, January 16th (MLK Holiday) **
9 AM to 2 PM
**Hilton Garden Inn **
501 E Broad Street in Richmond
**_
_**
**_**_Invited Speakers: _**_**
_Ed Gillespie _
_ Supervisor Corey Stewart _
_Senator Frank Wagner _
[****RSVP today****](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=a4ef9b95971ab89d77f227cc7db9edfb9b7be33180ae1815a5c8092441c5e5f481687b0b6c80acaf)
** _
_**
******Bus locations available on the link and below. ******
**** ****
****
You don't have to be an experienced policy advocate to be successful: AFP will train you and provide handouts, talking points, and lunch, as well as set up all meetings. Our [free](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=a4ef9b95971ab89d0cd30ecac66394f68ec19514e42a343a3be4f48c8114bbc8f4174b2759346d45 "free") bus transportation will bring you to Richmond and back. You can find our bus stop locations and other details [here](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=a4ef9b95971ab89db81f5892cb6775031ddacc8e5e542c784a72e98d43230fbf8cbf4eded12f45d7 "here").

Our Commonwealth's future is in our hands. Don't miss the opportunity to make a difference and [Build the Path to Prosperity](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=a4ef9b95971ab89d63b7f429cde1ab5a6675825dd1b2d8b98899459441aefd41231227fbb77a6b61).

Sincerely,

Tyler Foote
Virginia State Director
Americans for Prosperity

****

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com **

We respect your right to privacy - [**view our policy**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=a4ef9b95971ab89d199d65eb4a188091422f2de51c666639417493530e45db2855628174503d5f42)
Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201
****
******[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU)******
****

name: 2017 Inaugural Ball Committee
subject: Inaugural Ball Tickets On Sale Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the 2017 Governor's Inaugural Ball Committee
body:
---
You are invited to join
Governor Steve & First Lady Lisa Bullock
and
Lt. Governor Mike & DeeAnn Cooney
along with their families
for the 2017 Governor's Inaugural Ball **Saturday, January 28, 2017 - 7:00 p.m. to Midnight
Montana Army National Guard Aviation Hangar
3333 Skyway Drive • Helena, Montana** _Live music & dancing • Appetizers & desserts • Beer, wine & spirits
Montana Formal Attire - Business Suit Acceptable_ _
_
**Tickets are on sale now**[**ONLINE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ilAXCA6yEwQCccz5HxDi7%2FSz0RlSYkKK) **[
](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7BNxxYl0fevtP0sJV0DbtfSz0RlSYkKK)**_Please Note - Parking at the venue on January 28th is limited to handicapped parking only. Ball guests will park in the Costco parking lot on 2195 East Custer Avenue and take shuttles to the Hangar. Shuttles will run to the Ball starting at 6:45pm and continue throughout the evening._[](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=BhxHzRrNMkG1kf7CKV5NJ%2FSz0RlSYkKK) Tickets to the Kids' Ball on January 27th are also available online now. [

](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MVNGkSbB2qE%2FNO3BF8s1fPSz0RlSYkKK)**2017 Governor 's Inaugural Kids Ball
Friday, January 27, 2017 • 7:00 p.m. to 9:00 p.m.
Helena Civic Center • 340 Neill Avenue • Helena, Montana** _Fun, food and dancing_
[](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2FvvpkkfWXijtVr42yswUJ%2FSz0RlSYkKK) ** KIDS' Ball Tickets are on sale now [ONLINE](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=c7y3Qvi3nGDwDd7rchmig%2FSz0RlSYkKK) ** For other information or ball updates please visit [stevebullock.com/ball/](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=E2dVHIvcGSM7%2FJOo%2B%2FidRfSz0RlSYkKK) and we look forward to seeing you in Helena!

| Paid for by the 2017 Governor's Inaugural Ball Committee
Post Ooffice Box 1934, Helena, MT 59624

---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=pdMBiQB3Xnbn4FCNBBD0ffSz0RlSYkKK).

2017 Governor's Inaugural Ball Committee
Post Office Box 1934
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)
